description: Property definitions — maps property codes to stat functions used by affixes and uniques.

set1.description: Stat set ID for function slot 1

func1.description: Function ID for stat application slot 1

set2.description: Stat set ID for function slot 2

func2.description: Function ID for stat application slot 2

set3.description: Stat set ID for function slot 3

func3.description: Function ID for stat application slot 3

set4.description: Stat set ID for function slot 4

func4.description: Function ID for stat application slot 4

stat4.description: Stat reference for slot 4 (slots 1-3 use set1-3 as stat refs)

set5.description: Stat set ID for function slot 5

func5.description: Function ID for stat application slot 5

stat5.description: Stat reference for slot 5 (slots 1-3 use set1-3 as stat refs)

set6.description: Stat set ID for function slot 6

func6.description: Function ID for stat application slot 6

stat6.description: Stat reference for slot 6 (slots 1-3 use set1-3 as stat refs)

set7.description: Stat set ID for function slot 7

func7.description: Function ID for stat application slot 7

stat7.description: Stat reference for slot 7 (slots 1-3 use set1-3 as stat refs)

*eol.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game)

Done.description: Whether this property definition is finalized

ModFuncOffset.description: Modifier function offset used to locate the stat application logic

Min.description: Description of what the minimum parameter value represents

Max.description: Description of what the maximum parameter value represents

values: "max at center period, min at opposite period, linear progression"
random amount from min to max is assigned to item
random chance from min to max is assigned to item
Additional Notes.description: Developer notes on how the property behaves or special calculation rules
